/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX14.4.sdk -mmacosx-version-min=14.2 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -o /Users/lilithgames/Desktop/workspace/cmake/project_lib/lib/libprog.dylib -install_name @rpath/libprog.dylib CMakeFiles/prog.dir/src/add.cpp.o CMakeFiles/prog.dir/src/div.cpp.o CMakeFiles/prog.dir/src/mult.cpp.o CMakeFiles/prog.dir/src/sub.cpp.o
